message:
test(scheduler): add 17 cancel lane fairness & starvation bound tests (bd-1jxe3)

Parametric bound verification across cancel_streak_limit values (1, 2, 4,
8, 16, 32), PreemptionMetrics validation, timed lane starvation bounds,
streak reset behaviour, fallback dispatch, FIFO ordering, continuous
injection stress, multi-worker fairness, and deterministic dispatch order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
